title: Synthesizing the Stack in Prose
concept: Consolidating the full system flow into a clear architectural reference sheet.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of sandboxing in AI systems?
exercises.explain: Sandboxing helps keep AI systems secure by preventing them from performing unauthorized actions.

cards.title: Architectural Reference Sheet
cards.body: An architectural reference sheet is a visual summary of how different components of an AI system work together.

cards.title: What is System Flow?
cards.body: System flow outlines the steps and interactions between various parts of an AI system, showing how data moves and how decisions are made.

cards.title: Like Traffic Lights
cards.body: Think of an architectural reference sheet like a traffic signal system. It shows how cars, pedestrians, and bikes interact safely on the road.

cards.title: Example of an Architecture Sheet
cards.body: An architecture sheet might include boxes for each AI agent, arrows for data flow, and annotations for security measures like sandboxing.

cards.title: Myth: It's All Just a Diagram
cards.body: Some think an architectural reference sheet is just a diagram. In reality, it's a comprehensive guide to understanding system interactions.

cards.title: Visualizing the Stack
cards.body: Visual inspiration can greatly aid in creating effective reference sheets.

right.text: How they work together in a unified system.

exercises.prompt: What is the main purpose of an architectural reference sheet?

options.text: To clarify how different parts connect and interact
To provide user guides for AI agents

exercises.explain: The correct answer highlights that the main purpose of an architectural reference sheet is to illustrate the connections and interactions between the components of an AI system.

exercises.prompt: An architectural reference sheet only includes diagrams, not written information. True or False?
exercises.explain: The statement is false because an architectural reference sheet includes both diagrams and written explanations to provide clarity.

exercises.prompt: A clear architectural reference sheet helps in understanding the system's __________.
exercises.sentence: A clear architectural reference sheet helps in understanding the system's flow.
exercises.explain: Understanding the 'flow' of the system is crucial when creating an architectural reference sheet.

exercises.prompt: Which option best describes an architectural reference sheet?

options.text: A compilation of agent performance metrics
A structured overview of system components and interactions

exercises.explain: The correct option describes an architectural reference sheet as a structured overview, which is essential for understanding how different components of an AI system work together.

exercises.prompt: What are the key elements to include when synthesizing an architectural reference sheet for an AI stack?

options.text: Just a list of software licenses
Only a visual diagram without explanations

exercises.explain: The correct answer includes all important elements like components, interactions, and security measures, showing how they fit together in the overall architecture.
